name: Explosive Ammunition (Greater)
description:
Ammunition any

Activate (1 Action) (manipulate)

This piece of ammunition is coated in gritty black soot. When activated greater explosive ammunition hits a target, the missile explodes in a 10-foot burst, dealing 10d6 fire damage to each creature in the area (including the target). Each creature must attempt a DC 30 Reflex check save.
